rationale: Both ensures pin r1@ and r2@ to the same concrete map (Map::<K,ID>::empty()); re-asserting each ensures lines up the otherwise-disjoint triggers, transitivity yields r1@ == r2@, and the =~= assertion covers the extensional variant of map equality used by det_new_equal.
